iot.topicrule.dynamodbv2action.PutItem.Docs: Specifies the DynamoDB table to which the message data will be written. For example:   `{ "dynamoDBv2": { "roleArn": "aws:iam:12341251:my-role" "putItem": { "tableName": "my-table" } } }`   Each attribute in the message payload will be written to a separate column in the DynamoDB database.

iot.topicrule.dynamodbv2action.RoleArn.Docs: The ARN of the IAM role that grants access to the DynamoDB table.
